headline: The Commonwealth of Virginia Is Right to Proceed with Caution on the Proposed NextEra–Dominion Merger
summary: Virginia Distributed Solar Alliance and Secure Solar Futures Urge Virginia to Protect Ratepayers and Remove Barriers to Distributed Energy Virginia Distributed Solar Alliance The Virginia Distributed Solar Alliance was formed in 2013 to protect the right of all Virginians to access affordable solar power without high costs due to unnecessary restrictions. Since then, we have expanded our focus to remove barriers to all forms of local, small-scale clean energy produced near where it’s used in com

headline: AI Data Centers Are About to Break the Grid. One Company Just Spent $67 Billion to Fix It
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) announced on May 18, 2026 an all-stock agreement to acquire Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) for $67 billion, a figure the press release frames as the largest energy deal since the 1998 Exxon-Mobil merger. The headline works out to $76 per Dominion share, paid as 0.8138 shares of NextEra Energy plus an aggregate $360 ... AI Data Centers Are About to Break the Grid. One Company Just Spent $67 Billion to Fix It

headline: Can OKLO's $1.68B Fuel Recycling Push Turn Into a Growth Lever?
summary: OKLO is betting $1.68B on a private Oak Ridge fuel-recycling plant to unlock unused nuclear energy and supply its Aurora reactors.

headline: One Thing Investors Should Know About NextEra's Acquisition of Dominion
summary: In a blockbuster deal, NextEra Energy will acquire Dominion for nearly $67 billion.
